Name: id
Description: Belvo's unique identifier for the current item.

Name: link
Description: The `link.id` the data belongs to.

Name: created_at
Description: The ISO-8601 timestamp of when the data point was created in Belvo's database.

Name: collected_at
Description: The ISO-8601 timestamp when the data point was collected.

Name: operation_identifier
Description: The network's unique identifier for the exchange operation.

Name: operation_number
Description: The 12-digit operation registration number from the Brazil Central Bank (Bacen). This can be `null` if the operation has not yet been registered.

Name: operation_type
Description:
The type of exchange operation.

We return one of the following enum values:
  - `COMPRA` - Buy (client is buying foreign currency)
  - `VENDA` - Sell (client is selling foreign currency)

Name: operation_requested_at
Description: The ISO-8601 timestamp when the exchange operation was contracted.

Name: authorized_institution_identifier
Description: The CNPJ of the institution authorized to conduct the operation.

Name: authorized_institution_name
Description: The name of the authorized institution.

Name: intermediary_institution_identifier
Description: The CNPJ of the intermediary institution, if one was used.

Name: intermediary_institution_name
Description: The name of the intermediary institution. Must be present if `intermediary_institution_identifier` is available.

Name: operation_due_date
Description:
The currently scheduled settlement date for the operation, in `YYYY-MM-DD` format. 

> **Note**: This field is updated if any changes are made to the exchange operation.

Name: local_operation_tax_amount
Description: The exchange rate applied to the operation.

Name: local_operation_tax_currency
Description: The three-letter currency code (ISO-4217) for the exchange rate.

Name: local_operation_value_amount
Description: The total value of the operation in local currency.

Name: local_operation_value_currency
Description: The three-letter currency code (ISO-4217) for the local currency.

Name: foreign_operation_value_amount
Description: The total value of the operation in the foreign currency.

Name: foreign_operation_value_currency
Description: The three-letter currency code (ISO-4217) for the foreign currency.

Name: operation_outstanding_balance_amount
Description: The outstanding balance to be settled, in the foreign currency. In the case that the exchange operation is scheduled to be settled within two days of the `operation_requested_at`, this value can be `null`.

Name: operation_outstanding_balance_currency
Description: The currency of the outstanding balance. Required if `operation_outstanding_balance_amount` is not `null`.

Name: tev_amount_amount
Description: The "All-in Rate" (Valor Efetivo Total/Total Effective Cost), representing the total cost of the operation. Required when the operation is scheduled to be settled within two days of the `operation_requested_at` and does not exceed $100,000 USD.

Name: tev_amount_currency
Description: The currency of the VET (always BRL). Required if `tev_amount_amount` is not `null`.

Name: local_currency_advance_percentage
Description: The percentage of the foreign currency value that was granted to the client in advance. In the case that the exchange operation is scheduled to be settled within two days of the `operation_requested_at`, this value can be `null`.

Name: settlement_method
Description:
The method of delivery for the foreign currency.

We return one of the following enum values:
  - `CARTA_CREDITO_A_VISTA` (Code 10) - Sight letter of credit
  - `CARTA_CREDITO_A_PRAZO` (Code 15) - Term letter of credit
  - `CONTA_DEPOSITO` (Code 20) - Deposit account
  - `CONTA_DEPOSITO_MOEDA_ESTRANGEIRA_PAIS` (Code 21) - Foreign currency deposit account in country
  - `CONTA_DEPOSITO_EXPORTADOR_MANTIDA_NO_EXTERIOR` (Code 22) - Exporter's deposit account maintained abroad
  - `CONTA_DEPOSITO_OU_PAGAMENTO_EXPORTADOR_INSTITUICAO_EXTERIOR` (Code 23) - Deposit account or payment to exporter at foreign institution
  - `CONVENIO_PAGAMENTOS_E_CREDITOS_RECIPROCOS` (Code 25) - Reciprocal payments and credits agreement
  - `CHEQUE` (Code 30) - Check
  - `ESPECIE_CHEQUES_VIAGEM` (Code 50) - Cash or traveler's checks
  - `CARTAO_PREPAGO` (Code 55) - Prepaid card
  - `TELETRANSMISSAO` (Code 65) - Wire transfer
  - `TITULOS_VALORES` (Code 75) - Securities/bonds
  - `SIMBOLICA` (Code 90) - Symbolic
  - `SEM_MOVIMENTACAO_VALORES` (Code 91) - No movement of funds
  - `DEMAIS` (Code 99) - Others
  - `OUTRO_NAO_MAPEADO_OFB` - Other not mapped by Open Finance Brazil
  - `null`
Enum: CONTA_DEPOSITO_MOEDA_ESTRANGEIRA_PAIS, CONTA_DEPOSITO_OU_PAGAMENTO_EXPORTADOR_INSTITUICAO_EXTERIOR, ESPECIE_CHEQUES_VIAGEM, CARTAO_PREPAGO, TELETRANSMISSAO, SEM_MOVIMENTACAO_VALORES, DEMAIS, CARTA_CREDITO_A_VISTA, CARTA_CREDITO_A_PRAZO, CONTA_DEPOSITO, CHEQUE, TITULOS_VALORES, SIMBOLICA, CONTA_DEPOSITO_EXPORTADOR_MANTIDA_NO_EXTERIOR, CONVENIO_PAGAMENTOS_E_CREDITOS_RECIPROCOS, OUTRO_NAO_MAPEADO_OFB, None

Name: operation_category_code
Description:
The 5-digit Central Bank code that classifies the "nature" of the operation.

This code must comply with the nature codes referenced in Resolution 277 or Circular 3690, as applicable to the exchange contract.

Name: results
Description: An array of exchange history objects.

Name: results[].id
Description: Belvo's unique identifier for the current item.

Name: results[].link
Description: The `link.id` the data belongs to.

Name: results[].exchange_id
Description: The Belvo-generated unique identifier for the original exchange operation.

Name: results[].created_at
Description: The ISO-8601 timestamp of when the data point was created in Belvo's database.

Name: results[].collected_at
Description: The ISO-8601 timestamp when the data point was collected.

Name: results[].operation_identifier
Description: The network's unique identifier for the exchange operation.

Name: results[].event_sequence_number
Description: The sequence number of the event record at the Central Bank (Bacen).

Name: results[].event_type
Description:
The type of event that occurred for the exchange operation.

We return one of the following enum values:
  - `1` - Contract in the primary market
  - `2` - Modification of exchange operation in the primary market
  - `3` - Cancellation of exchange operation in the primary market
  - `4` - Settlement of exchange operation in the primary market
  - `5` - Write-off of outstanding amount to be settled in the primary market
  - `6` - Reinstatement of written-off outstanding amount in the primary market
  - `9` - Nullification of exchange operation in the primary market (used, for example, in the nullification of a settlement/cancellation event)

> **Note**: Codes follow the messaging layout sent by institutions to the Central Bank of Brazil.

Name: results[].event_created_at
Description: The ISO-8601 timestamp when the event occurred.

Name: results[].operation_due_date
Description: The date when the operation (buy or sell), after the event, is scheduled to be settled, in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.

Name: results[].local_operation_tax_amount
Description: The exchange rate applied to the operation after the event.

Name: results[].local_operation_tax_currency
Description: The three-letter currency code (ISO-4217) for the exchange rate.

Name: results[].local_operation_value_amount
Description: The total value of the operation in local currency after the event.

Name: results[].local_operation_value_currency
Description: The three-letter currency code (ISO-4217) for the local currency.

Name: results[].foreign_operation_value_amount
Description: The total value of the operation in foreign currency after the event.

Name: results[].foreign_operation_value_currency
Description: The three-letter currency code (ISO-4217) for the foreign currency.

Name: results[].operation_outstanding_balance_amount
Description:
The outstanding balance to be settled in foreign currency after the event.

This field is mandatory for events created (`event_created_at`) from April 15, 2024 onwards, in cases of exchange operations with future settlement.

Name: results[].operation_outstanding_balance_currency
Description: The currency of the outstanding balance. Required if `operation_outstanding_balance_amount` is not `null`.

Name: results[].tev_amount_amount
Description:
The "All-in Rate" (Valor Efetivo Total/Total Effective Cost), representing the total cost of the operation after the event. 

This field is required for spot exchange operations that reach up to the limit of $100,000 USD or equivalent in other currencies.

Name: results[].tev_amount_currency
Description: The currency of the VET (always BRL). Required if `tev_amount_amount` is not `null`.

Name: results[].local_currency_advance_percentage
Description:
The percentage of the foreign currency value that was granted to the client in advance after the event.

This field is mandatory in cases of exchange operations with future settlement.

Name: results[].settlement_method
Description:
The method of delivery for the foreign currency.

We return one of the following enum values:
  - `CARTA_CREDITO_A_VISTA` (Code 10) - Sight letter of credit
  - `CARTA_CREDITO_A_PRAZO` (Code 15) - Term letter of credit
  - `CONTA_DEPOSITO` (Code 20) - Deposit account
  - `CONTA_DEPOSITO_MOEDA_ESTRANGEIRA_PAIS` (Code 21) - Foreign currency deposit account in country
  - `CONTA_DEPOSITO_EXPORTADOR_MANTIDA_NO_EXTERIOR` (Code 22) - Exporter's deposit account maintained abroad
  - `CONTA_DEPOSITO_OU_PAGAMENTO_EXPORTADOR_INSTITUICAO_EXTERIOR` (Code 23) - Deposit account or payment to exporter at foreign institution
  - `CONVENIO_PAGAMENTOS_E_CREDITOS_RECIPROCOS` (Code 25) - Reciprocal payments and credits agreement
  - `CHEQUE` (Code 30) - Check
  - `ESPECIE_CHEQUES_VIAGEM` (Code 50) - Cash or traveler's checks
  - `CARTAO_PREPAGO` (Code 55) - Prepaid card
  - `TELETRANSMISSAO` (Code 65) - Wire transfer
  - `TITULOS_VALORES` (Code 75) - Securities/bonds
  - `SIMBOLICA` (Code 90) - Symbolic
  - `SEM_MOVIMENTACAO_VALORES` (Code 91) - No movement of funds
  - `DEMAIS` (Code 99) - Others
  - `OUTRO_NAO_MAPEADO_OFB` - Other not mapped by Open Finance Brazil
  - `null`
Enum: CONTA_DEPOSITO_MOEDA_ESTRANGEIRA_PAIS, CONTA_DEPOSITO_OU_PAGAMENTO_EXPORTADOR_INSTITUICAO_EXTERIOR, ESPECIE_CHEQUES_VIAGEM, CARTAO_PREPAGO, TELETRANSMISSAO, SEM_MOVIMENTACAO_VALORES, DEMAIS, CARTA_CREDITO_A_VISTA, CARTA_CREDITO_A_PRAZO, CONTA_DEPOSITO, CHEQUE, TITULOS_VALORES, SIMBOLICA, CONTA_DEPOSITO_EXPORTADOR_MANTIDA_NO_EXTERIOR, CONVENIO_PAGAMENTOS_E_CREDITOS_RECIPROCOS, OUTRO_NAO_MAPEADO_OFB, None

Name: results[].operation_category_code
Description:
The 5-digit Central Bank code that classifies the "nature" of the operation.

This code must comply with the nature codes referenced in Resolution 277 or Circular 3690, as applicable to the exchange contract.

Name: results[].foreign_partie_relationship_code
Description:
The code indicating the relationship between the customer and the foreign payer/receiver.

This code must comply with the relationship codes referenced in Resolution 277 or Circular 3690, as applicable to the exchange contract.

> **Note**: This field is optional when:
> - The `settlement_method` field is `ESPECIE_CHEQUES_VIAGEM` or `CARTAO_PREPAGO`.
> - The `event_type` field is different from `4` (Settlement of exchange operation in the primary market).
>
> If the institution has this information, it is mandatory to send it. If the information is updated after contracting, it must be sent through events.

Name: results[].foreign_partie_name
Description:
The name of the foreign payer or receiver.

> **Note**: This field is optional when:
> - The `settlement_method` field is `ESPECIE_CHEQUES_VIAGEM` or `CARTAO_PREPAGO`.
> - The `event_type` field is different from `4` (Settlement of exchange operation in the primary market).
>
> If the institution has this information, it is mandatory to send it. If the information is updated after contracting, it must be sent through events.

Name: results[].foreign_partie_country_code
Description:
The country code of the foreign payer or receiver, following the ISO 3166-1 standard.

> **Note**: This field is optional when:
> - The `settlement_method` field is `ESPECIE_CHEQUES_VIAGEM` or `CARTAO_PREPAGO`.
> - The `event_type` field is different from `4` (Settlement of exchange operation in the primary market).
>
> If the institution has this information, it is mandatory to send it. If the information is updated after contracting, it must be sent through events.
